nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Following the resonance, you arrive at a secluded chamber. At its center, the Crescent Tear hangs suspended within a cocoon of glowing black vines.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Is... that the Crescent Tear?

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Yes! That's the resonance I've been hearing!

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Finally. I'll rip those vines away.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Try to remove the vines.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: CRACK...

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The Crescent Tear trembles as tiny cracks begin to spread across its surface. The vines tighten around it.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Stop! The vines are bound to the Crescent Tear. If you force them apart, you'll destroy it.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Then what are we supposed to do?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Leave this to me.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Feanor closes his eyes. A gentle blue aura surrounds him as the tangled vines dissolve into streams of luminous energy. Hidden threads of resonance become visible, each flowing with a different light.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: I can perceive their resonance...

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Only a few of these threads sustain the Crescent Tear. The others are feeding on its energy.

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Untangle only the parasitic threads. Leave the others untouched.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Use Feanor's Resonant Perception to identify and unravel the correct vines.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: As the final thread is released, the black vines wither away into glowing particles. The Crescent Tear gently descends into Kael's hands.

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: A soft chime echoes throughout the chamber.

nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: The resonance... it's finally stable.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Good thing I didn't pull any harder...

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Obtain the Crescent Tear.
